description: Convert the model rocket design at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/janus_29mm.ork for printing with Lightweight PLA (LW-PLA). The primary structural components (Nose Cone, exterior Body Tubes, and Fin set) must have a material density of 0.65 g/cm³, while internal motor mounts and recovery gear densities remain unchanged. The final configuration must achieve a stability margin of at least 1.50 calibers. Save the modified design to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/janus_lw_pla.ork and export a summary report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/lw_pla_report.txt documenting the density, the ballast mass added, and the final stability margin.
